buildCommand: cd ../../ && pnpm --filter @workspace/gemini-surgicals run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dist=path.join('artifacts','gemini-surgicals','dist'); const out=path.join(dist,'public'); fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true}); const distIndex=path.join(dist,'index.html'); if(!fs.existsSync(distIndex)) process.exit(0); for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dist)){ if(entry==='public') continue; const src=path.join(dist,entry); const dst=path.join(out,entry); fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true}); }"
